# mcp-x402 — ScriptMasterLabs Unified AI Payment Gateway
# The Amazon for agentic payrails. One endpoint. Every SML product. Autonomous x402 payments.
# 43 tools · 11 products · 3 chains · 0 API keys required

## What this is

AI agents connect to one MCP server and get access to every ScriptMasterLabs product.
Pay per call in USDC (Base), RLUSD (XRPL), or USDC (Solana).
No API keys. No subscriptions. No human billing loop.

## Quick Start (30 seconds)

npm i -g @scriptmasterlabs/mcp-x402

Add to Claude Code / Cursor / any MCP client:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "sml": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["@scriptmasterlabs/mcp-x402"]
    }
  }
}

## Agent Instructions

1. Call sml_discover first (FREE) — get full product catalog, all tools, all prices
2. Call sml_status (FREE) — verify backends are online before paid calls
3. Call any tool — free tools respond instantly, paid tools auto-collect via x402
4. Every paid response includes _meta.receipt_id for your audit trail

## Payment Error Handling

If a paid call returns { error: "payment_required" }, the response includes:
  next.call        — which tool to call (usually proof_invoice)
  next.endpoint_id — the endpoint UUID
  next.amount_usdc — exact amount required
  next.chain       — recommended chain

This lets you self-heal: call proof_invoice → pay → proof_verify → retry.

## All 43 Tools

### Discovery & Health [FREE]
sml_discover           — Full product catalog, all tools, all prices. START HERE.
sml_status             — Real-time health of all 8 SML backends. Check before paid calls.

### SqueezeOS — Institutional Equity Intelligence (squeezeos-api.onrender.com)
[FREE]       squeezeos_preview            — Signal bias preview for any ticker (15-min cache)
[FREE]       squeezeos_history            — Signal history, up to 200 events per symbol
[FREE]       squeezeos_oracle             — Oracle directive: aggregated multi-engine signal
[FREE]       squeezeos_ftd                — SEC FTD registry for threshold securities
[FREE]       squeezeos_status             — SqueezeOS system health
[FREE]       squeezeos_demo               — Free IWM council verdict sample
[FREE]       squeezeos_marketplace_browse — Browse peer signal marketplace listings
[FREE]       squeezeos_futures_leaderboard— Top signal prediction market performers
[PAID $0.10] squeezeos_council            — Multi-engine AI council verdict for any symbol
[PAID $0.05] squeezeos_scan               — Full $1–$50 squeeze candidate scanner
[PAID $0.05] squeezeos_options            — Institutional options flow + dark pool sweeps
[PAID $0.03] squeezeos_iwm                — IWM 0DTE contract scorer with live Greeks
[PAID $0.02] squeezeos_marketplace_read   — Full signal thesis from peer marketplace

### Ghost Layer — Dual-Chain Routing (ghost-layer.onrender.com)
[FREE]       ghost_status — Service health and active routes
[PAID $0.01] ghost_route  — Route tx through dual-chain XRPL+Base gateway

### 402Proof — Payment Infrastructure (four02proof.onrender.com)
[FREE] proof_invoice      — Generate x402 payment invoice (amount, chain, wallet)
[FREE] proof_verify       — Verify payment tx_hash, get receipt
[FREE] proof_credit_score — Agent credit score 300–850 by wallet address

### RLUSD Rails — XRP Remittance (sml-rails.onrender.com)
[FREE]       rails_status   — RLUSD Rails health and network status
[PAID $0.01] rails_transfer — Initiate RLUSD or XRP transfer, returns tx_hash

### XRPL Copy-Trader — Whale Following (sml-copytrader.onrender.com)
[FREE]       copytrader_status    — Service health and subscription count
[FREE]       copytrader_whales    — List tracked whales with recent moves and P&L
[PAID $0.05] copytrader_subscribe — Subscribe to mirror a whale wallet automatically

### Memecoin Launchpad — XRPL Token Launch (sml-launchpad.onrender.com)
[FREE]       launchpad_status — Launchpad health and total tokens launched
[FREE]       launchpad_list   — Browse live memecoins: price, volume, holders
[PAID $0.10] launchpad_create — Create new memecoin with bonding curve
[PAID $0.01] launchpad_buy    — Buy tokens on bonding curve, get executed price

### Shadow Desk — Signal Intelligence (shadow-desk.onrender.com)
[PAID $0.02] shadow_query  — Query alpha signal intelligence feed
[PAID $0.01] shadow_ingest — Ingest alpha signal data for distribution

### Forge Gateway — LLM Proxy (forge-gateway-a822.onrender.com)
[FREE]       forge_status — Gateway health and supported models
[PAID $0.02] forge_llm    — BYOK LLM proxy — any AI model, pay per request via x402

### agentcard — A2A Identity
[FREE]       agentcard_lookup — Lookup agent identity card by wallet or DID
[FREE]       agentcard_verify — Verify Ed25519 agent signature
[PAID $0.01] agentcard_mint   — Create new Ed25519 agent identity card, get DID

### Core SML Intelligence
[PAID $0.05]         leviathan_signal      — Institutional squeeze signals, multi-engine verdict
[PAID $0.02]         xmit_edgar_decode     — Parse SEC DEF 14A / 13F / 13D filings
[PAID $0.02]         xdeo_earnings_estimate— Decentralized earnings oracle
[FREE|PAID $0.05]    ftd_threshold_scan    — SEC Reg SHO FTD data (alerts free, full scanner paid)
[FREE|PAID 5% comm]  nexus_agent_hire      — Agent marketplace (browse free, hire costs commission)
[PAID $0.005]        crawl_paid_fetch      — Pay-per-fetch web scraping

### echo-forge — Historical Patterns [COMING SOON]
[PAID $0.05] echo_pattern_match — Historical equity pattern similarity search (ML/Polygon.io)

## Spend Controls
Daily cap:          $50.00 per wallet — hard limit, no exceptions
Auto-approve:       Sessions under $1.00
Price cache:        60 seconds max — stale prices rejected
Credit Bureau min:  Score 300 for auto-approve

## Security
Private keys:       OS keychain ONLY — never disk, never env vars
API connections:    mTLS with pinned certs
Audit log:          Append-only SHA-256 chained, 7-day local + cloud backup
Input validation:   Zod on 100% of inputs
Rate limits:        100 req/min per tool, 1000 req/day per wallet

GitHub:        https://github.com/timwal78/sml_portfolio/tree/main/mcp-x402
